shares_unlock: Number of pieces needed to unlock
share_instructions: Please stash each generated share securely, no cap. Your server needs to pull at least the specified number of shares to unlock the disks.
not_shown_again: These shares won’t pop up again.
download_locations_instructions: Set the spots where the plugin should grab the key pieces during boot. Put each spot on its own line. Example supported formats are in the sample below:
